name: Corporate Certificate Injector
description: Injects corporate TLS/SSL certificates into system and language-specific trust stores, enabling devcontainers to work behind TLS-inspecting proxies

certPath.description: Directory where corporate certificates are mounted from the host

injectJava.description: Inject certificates into the Java keystore

injectPython.description: Inject certificates into Python certifi bundle

injectGit.description: Configure Git to use the corporate CA bundle

injectGo.description: Set SSL_CERT_FILE and SSL_CERT_DIR for Go
